# Uvcare B2B Supply

> Professional B2B manufacturer of invisible aligner care accessories. OEM/ODM solutions for dental clinics and distributors worldwide. Based in Shenzhen, China.

## Products

- [Retainer Cases](https://dentalcarepack.com/products/retainer-case): Wholesale aligner and retainer cases with mirror, silicon, magnetic closure. MOQ 100 PCS. Custom logo available.
- [Cleaning Boxes](https://dentalcarepack.com/products/cleaning-box): UV-C sterilizer cases, ultrasonic cleaners, soaking boxes. MOQ 200-1000 PCS.
- [Gift Boxes](https://dentalcarepack.com/products/gift-box): Premium orthodontic packaging for patient welcome kits. MOQ 100 PCS.
- [Dental Accessories](https://dentalcarepack.com/products/dental-accessories): Aligner removal hooks, chewies, orthodontic tools. MOQ 500-1000 PCS.

## Insights

- [Ultrasonic Cleaning Guide](https://dentalcarepack.com/insights/ultrasonic-cleaner-guide): How 45,000Hz ultrasonic waves clean aligners
- [Aligner Case Buying Guide](https://dentalcarepack.com/insights/aligner-case-buying-guide): Compare V1, round, silicon, and specialty cases
- [UV Sterilizer vs Ultrasonic Cleaner](https://dentalcarepack.com/insights/uv-sterilizer-vs-ultrasonic-cleaner): Which one does your dental clinic need?
- [Do UV Aligner Cases Actually Work?](https://dentalcarepack.com/insights/do-uv-aligner-cases-work): Manufacturer's honest answer with science and Reddit analysis
- [Wholesale Buying Guide](https://dentalcarepack.com/insights/wholesale-aligner-cases-guide): MOQ, pricing tiers, certifications, supplier evaluation

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2016
- Location: A309, Fanghua Industrial Area, Bao'an District, Shenzhen, China
- Certifications: ISO 9001, CE, FDA Compliant
- MOQ: Starting from 100 PCS
- Lead Time: 7-20 days depending on product
- Customization: Full OEM/ODM with in-house design team
- Shipping: Worldwide (DHL/FedEx/UPS)
- Contact: ban@grouprsh.com / +86 188 2288 5445
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/8618822885445
